heading: From the neighborhood
note: Curated posts, hand-picked by the restaurant. Replace with a live feed integration when the owners connect their accounts (see STATE.md).

posts.author: @portorchardeats
posts.text: Rainy Tuesday, tonkotsu fix. This broth deserves its own fan club. 🍜

posts.author: Kitsap Foodies
posts.text: Herndon roll at Kumo — four kinds of fish on top and it still isn't the best part. The best part is watching them torch it.

posts.author: @soundside.bites
posts.text: Five tables. Zero regrets. Get the katsu to start.
